summary: Key facts for meta-prediction on Lisa Cook Fed question CP being above 11% on Jan 15 2026
content:
- CP as of Jan 3, 2026: exactly 11.00%
- Threshold: strictly above 11.00%
- Resolution: Jan 15, 2026 at 11:56:27
- 102 forecasters on underlying question
- Supreme Court agreed Oct 2025 to hear oral arguments in January 2026 (exact date unknown)
- Cook stays in office pending SCOTUS ruling
- Ruling expected before end of June 2026
- Cook has 14-year term, removal never happened before in Fed history
- Trump attempted removal in Aug 2025 alleging mortgage fraud
- Cook filed lawsuit, Aug hearing concluded without ruling
- SCOTUS then took the case with arguments in January
- Cook gave speech at Brookings Nov 2025, still active on FOMC
- FOMC statement Dec 10, 2025 - normal operations
- No Polymarket markets found on this specific question
